handlers.name: ChangeSuppressionHandler
handlers.description: Handles instant suppression changes (buffs/debuffs) applied by skills

functions.name: Apply
functions.description: Applies suppression change to target entity. If UseOwner flag is set and target has owner, applies to owner instead.

functions.name: OnAdded
functions.description: Triggered when effect first added. If TriggerType==1, immediately applies suppression.

functions.name: OnApply
functions.description: Triggered during skill application to tile. If TriggerType==0, applies suppression to tile entity.

fields.description: Reference to the owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)
Reference to the effect template/definition
TriggerType - When to apply effect: 0=OnApply (skill hits tile), 1=OnAdded (effect attached)
SuppressionAmount - Value passed to Actor.ChangeSuppressionAndUpdateAP
UseOwner - If true and target has owner, apply suppression to owner instead of target

handlers.name: SuppressionHandler
handlers.description: Manages ongoing suppression state for actors (normal units). Handles state transitions, AP penalties, accuracy/mobility penalties, and turn skipping.

functions.name: OnRoundStart
functions.description: Handles suppression effects at round start. State 0 resets counter, State 1 reduces AP by 30, State 2 sets AP to 0 and may force SkipTurn.

functions.name: OnUpdate
functions.description: Updates suppression state each cycle. Applies accuracy penalty for suppressed (-0.15), mobility penalty for pinned.

functions.name: UpdateBehavior
functions.description: Updates behavior based on suppression state. Applies accuracy modifier and stance changes.

functions.name: OnSuppressionStateChanged
functions.description: Handles state transitions. Plays sounds, sets stances, adjusts AP, adds/removes pinned skills.

fields.description: Reference to the owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)
Reference to the effect template/definition
CurrentSuppressionState - Cached state: 0=Normal, 1=Suppressed, 2=PinnedDown
SuppressionCounter - Incremented when pinned, used for mobility penalty calculation
SuppressedSound - Audio ID played when entering Suppressed state
PinnedDownSound - Audio ID played when entering PinnedDown state
PinnedSkillTemplate - Skill template added when pinned (e.g., break free skill), removed when not pinned

0.name: Normal
effects: Stance set to standing if currently crouching

1.name: Suppressed
effects: AP reduced by 30 (unless immune via flag 0xEC bit 12)

2.name: PinnedDown
effects: May force SkipTurn if no usable pinned skills

handlers.name: SuppressionConstructHandler
handlers.description: Manages ongoing suppression state for constructs (turrets, drones, etc.). Similar to SuppressionHandler but without AP reduction at Suppressed state.

functions.name: OnRoundStart
functions.description: Handles suppression effects at round start. State 2 increments counter, sets AP to 0, may force SkipTurn.

functions.name: OnSuppressionStateChanged
functions.description: Handles state transitions for constructs. Adds/removes skills, plays sounds, sets animator overloaded param.

functions.name: OnUpdate
functions.description: Updates suppression state for constructs. Applies mobility penalty based on counter.

functions.name: SetAnimatorOverloadedParam
functions.description: Sets animator overloaded parameter for visual feedback. Iterates through elements with random delay.

functions.name: UpdateBehavior
functions.description: Updates behavior based on suppression state changes.

fields.description: Reference to the owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)
Reference to the effect template/definition
CurrentSuppressionState - Cached state: 0=Normal, 1=Suppressed, 2=PinnedDown
SuppressionCounter - Incremented when pinned, used for mobility penalty calculation
PinnedDownSound - Audio ID played when entering PinnedDown state
PinnedDropdownText - Text displayed in unit HUD when pinned
PinnedSkillTemplate - Skill template added when pinned, removed when not pinned

differences_from_suppression_handler: No AP reduction at Suppressed state (state 1)
Uses animator overloaded parameter for visual feedback
Different display text handling at offset 0x60

fields.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler
Reference to the effect template defining this handler's behavior

GetActor.description: Returns the actor entity using the skill via handler->skill->GetActor()

GetEntity.description: Returns the entity using the skill via handler->skill->GetEntity()

key_discoveries.finding: ChangeSuppressionHandler uses effect template offsets 0x58 (TriggerType), 0x5C (SuppressionAmount), and 0x60 (UseOwner flag)
key_discoveries.significance: Allows modding of when and how much suppression is applied, and whether it targets owner or direct target

key_discoveries.finding: SuppressionHandler uses Stem.ID at effect+0x58 for suppressed sound and effect+0x60 for pinned sound
key_discoveries.significance: Sounds are stored as Stem.ID structures and played via Stem_ID__Play with volume/pitch parameters

key_discoveries.finding: Both SuppressionHandler and SuppressionConstructHandler can inject skills from template at 0x68 when PinnedDown
key_discoveries.significance: This is the mechanism for adding 'break free' or 'recover' skills when units are pinned

key_discoveries.finding: Suppressed state reduces AP by 30 (0x1E), Pinned state drains all AP. Immunity check at actor+0xEC bit 12
key_discoveries.significance: Allows immunity to suppression AP drain via status flags

key_discoveries.finding: Accuracy modifier at properties+0x6C, Mobility modifier at properties+0xDC
key_discoveries.significance: Key offsets for understanding how suppression affects combat stats

key_discoveries.finding: SuppressionConstructHandler skips AP reduction at Suppressed state and uses animator 'overloaded' parameter instead
key_discoveries.significance: Different handling for mechanical units vs organic units

key_discoveries.finding: Handler stores CurrentSuppressionState at 0x20 and SuppressionCounter at 0x24
key_discoveries.significance: Counter persists across rounds and affects mobility penalty calculation

key_discoveries.finding: When pinned, system checks HasUsableActiveSkillForPinnedDown to determine if turn should be skipped
key_discoveries.significance: Allows units to use specific skills even when pinned (marked as UsableWhenPinnedDown)

actor.ChangeSuppressionAndUpdateAP: Applies suppression change and updates action points
actor.SkipTurn: Forces actor to skip their turn
actor.IsActive: Checks if actor is currently active
actor.HasActed: Checks if actor has taken actions this turn

skill_container.HasUsableActiveSkillForPinnedDown: Checks if any skill can be used while pinned

tactical_manager.InvokeOnSuppressed: Broadcasts suppression event to tactical system
